calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Danial Stern, Esq., for the Plaintiff 245 Leavenworth Street, LP.
Anne Birdseye, witness sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Jose E.K. Xool.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff 245 Leavenworth Street, LP.and against defendant Jose E.K. Xool.
Does 1-10 dismissed without pprejudice.
The Lease is forfeited.

Possession of the premises located at 245 Leavenworth Street, #36 San Francisco, CA

Holdover damages $2509.16
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
for a Total Judgment of $2509.16
Judgment signed in open court.

Appearances:
Plaintiff 245 Leavenworth Street LP is present. Represented by Anne Birdseye.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jose Ek Xool is not present.
